2381000.name: Saber Ball Demo
2381000.description:
Retro-futuristic VR game were you hit energy balls with glowing sabers. Inspired by Beat Saber and Pinball.

Your main objective is to get a high-score with various different modes and maps. You can do so by hitting the energy balls trough ports and pipes.

By completing challenges you unlock new hilts and with them you can customize your saber.
